query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pillar_conclusions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `menteeId` int NOT NULL,
  `pillarId` int NOT NULL,
  `conclusoesJson` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `geradoPorIa` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `iaGeneratedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `liberadoParaMentorado` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `liberadoEm` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `menteeId_pillarId_idx` (`menteeId`, `pillarId`)
);

  `liberadoEm` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
